# Frames

**Data field**

An 8-bit unsigned integer that specifies the starting number of frames.

## Overview

This field’s value cannot exceed the value of the number of frames field in the timecode sample description.

## Data fields

- **Hours**: An 8-bit unsigned integer that indicates the starting number of hours.
- **Negative**: A 1-bit value indicating the time’s sign.
- **Minutes**: A 7-bit integer that contains the starting number of minutes.
- **Seconds**: An 8-bit unsigned integer indicating the starting number of seconds.
